description: Purple tie-dye monkey plush — sewing and restuffing.
itemDetails:
This purple tie-dye monkey plush fits the bright novelty plush trend that expanded through mass retail and carnival-prize channels in the 2000s and 2010s. Tie-dye dye patterns and oversized limbs are common design cues in this segment.

Construction is typically polyester velour or minky outer fabric with polyester fill and embroidered facial details for child-safety compliance. Market value is usually low-to-mid gift-plush range unless the toy is linked to a branded character line with identifiable tags.
